notes: Modules and completions remain shell-owned; structured output is serialized by Nushell before ptymark sees bytes.
Package and module loading do not interact with display rendering.
Prompt output and hooks remain shell-owned.
Prompt and transient output is byte-preserved.
History UI bypasses semantic rendering.
Directory hooks remain shell-owned.
External completion output remains shell-owned.
Environment integration does not alter display bytes.
Activation hooks remain shell-owned.
Full-screen selector bypasses semantic rendering.
Interactive selector bypasses rendering.
Full-screen terminal UI bypasses rendering.
Structured plugin output is formatted by Nushell; terminal controls remain preserved.
Structured plugin output does not interfere with the display gate.
Table output is ordinary terminal text unless the formatter emits controls.
Imported data is rendered by Nushell before ptymark sees bytes.
Value transformation has no terminal control ownership.
Custom values are formatted by Nushell and passed through.
Plugin protocol does not interact with terminal byte processing.
Correction suggestions are ordinary output and remain unchanged.
